initiatives.name: The Beautiful Idea
initiatives.description: A community mutual aid collective fostering solidarity and support through resource sharing, skill-building workshops, and direct community assistance. They work to create accessible spaces for organizing, education, and mutual support while building networks of care and resistance in Charlottesville.

initiatives.name: Charlottesville DSA
initiatives.description: Local chapter of the Democratic Socialists of America, the largest socialist organization in the country.

initiatives.name: Charlottesville Gender Expansive Network
initiatives.description: A community to provide a safe, enriching, and inclusive space for all trans, nonbinary, and gender expansive folks in the greater Charlottesville area

initiatives.name: Cville Medic Collective
initiatives.description: We check in on unhoused neighbors and medic for actions.

initiatives.name: Charlottesville Food Not Bombs
initiatives.description: We are an all-volunteer organization. We welcome new volunteers, to help with pickups of food donations, transport of food to our distribution site, or help at the distribution site.

initiatives.name: Cville Litter Pickers
initiatives.description: We do meetups where we litter pick in the Charlottesville and Albemarle county area for a few hours, then go socialize over lunch/dinner or drinks.
